prompt: Apply smoothing only on the masked skin regions while preserving details on eyes and lips.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Using image 2 as a mask guide, apply a smoothing effect to the skin regions that are covered by the black areas in image 2. Ensure that all fine details on the eyes and lips in image 1 are fully preserved, preventing any smoothing in these specific facial features.
objects: Smoothed skin regions (on forehead, cheeks, and nose)
